title: Stream Screamo Bands Letterbombs & Heaven Through Violence’s High-Concept Split LP PALLA

The post Stream Screamo Bands Letterbombs & Heaven Through Violence’s High-Concept Split LP <em>PALLA</em> appeared first on Stereogum.
full_text:
They're called Letterbombs, and yes, it's always explosive when their Bandcamp notifications hit my inbox. The Finnish screamo band's latest trick: teaming up with Boston comrades Heaven Through Violence on a high-concept split LP called PALLA.

I'm gonna let these bands explain it. As written on Bandcamp:

"palla" is a concept album whose libretto is the 2001 short story of the same name; side a (by heaven through violence) loosely adapts the events of volume 1 of palla, while side b (by letterbombs) adapts volume 2.

The short story in question, related to the Elder Scrolls RPGs, is described as "the classic, relatable tale of a boy in love with his friend's mother." I'm not going to pretend I know anything about the Elder Scrolls series or RPGs in general, but I do know these songs are bringing the requisite amounts of heat. Stream PALLA below.
